name: preface-text-and-image
description: Assistant offers descriptive text, triggers an image tool, then follows up with another suggestion.

content.text: Please describe huskies pulling a sled in the snow, generate the image, then suggest a new scene.

tools.name: generate_and_show_image
tools.description: Render an image and return an attachment identifier.

content.text: Please describe huskies pulling a sled in the snow, generate the image, then suggest a new scene.
Imagine the huskies charging across the glistening snow — I will fetch that image for you now.

args.prompt: Huskies pulling a sled through a snowy forest.

A team of Siberian Huskies pulling a sled through a snowy landscape. The dogs are energetic and strong, with their thick fur coats glistening in the sunlight. The sled is traditional wooden, with a driver dressed in warm winter gear. The background features snow-covered trees and a clear blue sky.

A serene winter scene with a cozy cabin in the woods, smoke rising from the chimney. The cabin is surrounded by tall pine trees covered in snow, and a frozen lake can be seen in the distance. Soft snowflakes are falling gently, creating a peaceful atmosphere.

result.text:
Here is the image of huskies pulling a sled in the snow:

![Huskies Pulling a Sled](attachment_husky_sled_image)

For a new scene, I suggest a serene winter landscape featuring a cozy cabin in the woods, surrounded by snow-covered pine trees and a frozen lake in the distance. Would you like to explore this scene further or create an image of it?
